summary: Reviewed target repo pull request gurnoorbassi/ag-social-media-management-system#2 before any merge.
notes: Read-only review only. Target PR #2 was inspected and left open and unmerged. Reviewed files were README.md, package.json, index.html, src/main.js, src/styles.css, src/data/templates.js, src/lib/safety.js, and src/lib/status.js. Target checks passed: npm.cmd run check, npm.cmd test, npm.cmd run build, and git diff --check. Review confirmed the app remains static and draft/staging only, keeps first-client setup in intake-needed state, uses REQUIRED_ placeholders only, blocks social OAuth, credentials, live posting, scheduling, analytics API, n8n activation, paid tools, and production deployment, and does not include tracking scripts, external API calls, live form wiring, real client private data, deployment config, target PR merge, Netlify action, Lead Gen change, AI Receptionist change, or Constitution change.
